membersPage.title: Team Members
membersPage.subtitle: Manage who has access to this workspace and their permissions.

modal.title: Invite Team Member
modal.desc: Invited users will see the invitation when they login.

roleNotes.adminNote: Admins can invite and remove other members.
roleNotes.editorNote: Editors can manage jobs and candidates.
roleNotes.viewerNote: Viewers can only see dashboard and reports.

messages.alreadyMember: {{email}} is already a member of this workspace.
messages.alreadyInvited: An invitation has already been sent to {{email}}.
messages.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this invitation?
messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this invitation log?
messages.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from the workspace? This will immediately revoke their access.
messages.ownerCannotRemove: The workspace owner cannot be removed.
